ai_summary: Anupam Rasayan India Limited has completed the nominal acquisition of Mates Visa Consultancy Private Limited for INR 10,000, making it a wholly-owned subsidiary. This transaction is explicitly a strategic maneuver to position the target as a "Person Acting in Concert" (PAC) for Anupam Rasayan's proposed acquisition of Bliss GVS Pharma Limited, despite the target's unrelated and minimal visa consultancy business. The significant business disconnect and the immediate plans to alter the target's objects and name suggest it will function as a legal vehicle rather than an operational integration.
